Evidence-Based Safety Tools
Three practice domains · 14 tools total — click any category to explore
🔍
Safety Coaching
Structured frameworks, rounding guides, and team development resources for leaders who reinforce High Reliability at the point of care.
🎯
Coaching Conversations
Structured guides for leaders to conduct effective safety coaching conversations — from recognition to corrective feedback — grounded in the 5:1 feedback framework. Content will include scripts, scenario examples, and debrief prompts.
✦ Content coming in next iteration
📋
Rounding Frameworks
Practical question banks and observation guides designed to support High Reliability Rounding. Leaders will find structured prompts to surface latent safety risks, recognize safe behaviors, and close the loop with staff in real time.
✦ Content coming in next iteration
📈
Team Development Resources
Facilitation tools, scenario-based learning cards, and structured reflection prompts to embed HRO principles into team meetings, huddles, and unit-level improvement cycles throughout the year.
✦ Content coming in next iteration
🔧

Safety coaching content will be added in the next iteration. The framework above outlines the three areas this section will cover — coaching conversations, rounding frameworks, and team development resources.

PMOE Powered · Cody.ai knowledge base
Ask PMOE Bot
Ask about any HRO tool — when to use it, how it’s applied, or how it compares to another. Every response draws exclusively from your organization’s approved content.
Welcome. I’m PMOE Bot — your High Reliability Organization safety assistant, drawing exclusively from your organization’s curated knowledge base.

I can help you with any of the following:
• Clarifying the purpose and application of any HRO tool
• Determining which tool best fits a given situation
• Understanding the distinctions between similar tools
• Translating HRO principles into frontline practice

How may I assist you today? PMOE Powered
Suggested inquiries
Bot parameters
  • Responds only from your Cody.ai knowledge base
  • References the specific HRO tool in every answer
  • Does not speculate beyond uploaded content
  • Escalates clinical and policy questions appropriately
  • Each session initializes fresh for privacy
